products.name: Heuraufe
products.underlyingMechanism: Welded closed-profile steel tube frame with pitched roof structure and bar-grid/hay-net retainer; multi-side open access; ground-mounted skid with tractor fork compatibility
products.functionalPromise: Supply protected hay to multiple horses simultaneously in a ground-mounted outdoor station that eliminates feed competition, reduces waste, and preserves natural head-down eating posture
differentiators: Roof-protected hay bay prevents contamination from rain/snow
Multi-side access eliminates Futterneid (feed envy) without physical dividers
Tractor skid/fork compatibility enables solo repositioning without disassembly
Bar-grid/hay-net limits pull-through rate, reducing waste 20-40% vs. open feeder

features.name: Multi-Side Open Frame
features.description: Open on 3-4 sides for multi-horse access

features.name: Pitched Roof Structure
features.description: Steel roof panel over hay bay sheds rain, snow, and UV

features.name: Tractor Fork / Skid Compatibility
features.description: Base skids allow front-loader repositioning without disassembly

features.name: Closed-Profile Tube Frame
features.description: Hollow RHS/SHS sections — no sharp edges in horse contact zone

constraints.name: Corrosion Protection Outsourcing
constraints.description: No in-house galvanizing; 1-2 weeks lead time

constraints.name: Vertical-Only Roof Coverage
constraints.description: Pitched roof covers only vertical precipitation

constraints.name: Fixed Unit Footprint
constraints.description: One-piece welded construction; cannot extend or reconfigure

constraints.name: CE / GPSR Compliance
constraints.description: Static structure; GPSR self-declaration and technical file required

constraints.name: Steel / Metal Materials Only
constraints.description: No composite or polymer structural elements

products.name: Paddockbox
products.technologyClass: Mobile Modular Steel Tube Paddock Enclosures
products.underlyingMechanism: Welded steel tube panel segments on heavy-duty brake-lockable castors; pinned/flanged inter-panel connectors; fold-flat/removable post hinge joints; configurable polygon perimeter; wall-hinge anchor option
products.functionalPromise: Enclose horses in a repositionable, configurable perimeter that allows tractor access through foldable posts without disassembly, enabling efficient yard management
differentiators: Castor-mounted: full assembled enclosure repositioned without dismantling
Hinge/removable posts: tractor-width corridor opens without removing panels
Modular segments: perimeter adjusted by adding/removing panels
Wall-hinge option: stable wall as anchor eliminates one full panel side

features.name: Castor-Mounted Panel Segments
features.description: Heavy-duty lockable castors per segment for repositioning

features.name: Fold-Flat / Removable Post System
features.description: Hinge joints allow posts to fold flat for tractor corridor

features.name: Modular Segment Configurability
features.description: Pinned connectors enable square, L-shaped, or polygon layouts

features.name: Closed-Tube Rail Construction
features.description: RHS/CHS profiles — no open edges in horse contact zone

features.name: Wall-Hinge Mounting Option
features.description: One end pins to wall, eliminating one full panel side

features.name: Hot-Dip Galvanized Finish
features.description: Same C3+ path; castor sockets protected during galvanizing

constraints.name: Hinge Joint Fatigue
constraints.description: 10,000-cycle prototype test mandatory before series production

constraints.name: Castor Brake Load Adequacy
constraints.description: Each castor must resist 500-800 kg lateral horse pressure

constraints.name: Corrosion Protection Outsourcing
constraints.description: Castor socket threads must be masked during galvanizing

constraints.name: No Weather Protection
constraints.description: Open-air perimeter; no shelter from precipitation

constraints.name: CE / Machinery Directive
constraints.description: Wheeled structure requires Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC risk assessment

constraints.name: Steel / Metal Materials Only
constraints.description: No composite or polymer structural elements
